name: Cordon Bleu Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the cubed cooked turkey and cubed cooked ham.
3. Add the chopped onion, shredded cheddar cheese, butter or margarine, all-purpose flour, light cream, dill weed, dry mustard, and ground nutmeg to the meat mixture. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a greased casserole dish.
5. Cover with foil and bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
6. Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
7. Turn off the heat and let the casserole cool for a few minutes before serving.
